impacts.description: Contribution to European open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies through research on next-generation AI agent architectures and capabilities.
Contribution to the Apply AI Strategy (COM xxxx(2025)) by developing and demonstrating next-generation AI agents ready for deployment in Apply AI application sectors.
Scientific advancement through open dissemination of AI agent research results to the European R&D community via the AI-on-demand platform, building European research capacity.
Economic impact through deployment of validated AI agent results via European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs) and Testing and Experiment Facilities, supporting industry adoption across key sectors.
Societal and sectoral impact through next-generation AI agent applications targeted at healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving as priority application sectors.
impacts.inference_note: The procedure_exceptions field specifies that grants must cover at least one proposal in each of three sectors: healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving. The societal impact of AI agent applications in these sectors is a direct logical consequence of the call's sector portfolio mandate and the Apply AI Strategy framing, though no standalone 'societal impact' statement is present in the topic text.
